name: Punchh Restaurant Loyalty & CRM API
what_it_does: Punchh REST API for restaurant loyalty and customer engagement platform (acquired by PAX Technology). Enables AI agents to manage loyalty program enrollment and points tracking, handle digital offers and coupon management, retrieve customer visit frequency and spend analytics, manage mobile app and digital wallet integrations, access A/B test and campaign data, handle gift card management, retrieve customer segmentation and predictive analytics, and integrate loyalty data with POS systems for QSR and fast casual restaurants.
use_cases: Managing loyalty enrollment and points from restaurant engagement automation agents
Retrieving customer frequency and spend analytics from guest intelligence agents
Managing digital offers and targeted campaigns from restaurant marketing agents
Integrating POS visit data with loyalty workflows from restaurant operations agents
not_for: Fine dining without QSR and fast casual high-frequency loyalty model
Retail loyalty without restaurant-specific visit frequency and menu item data
Enterprise loyalty without restaurant POS and mobile app integration focus
best_when: A QSR chain, fast casual brand, or multi-location restaurant group using Punchh wants AI agents to automate loyalty enrollment, offer management, guest segmentation, and targeted campaign analytics.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Guest dining behavior and purchase history creates detailed consumer profiles. Loyalty automation must comply with CAN-SPAM and TCPA for push and SMS. Predictive analytics on dining behavior requires data minimization practices.

auth.notes: Punchh uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Brand-level credentials with loyalty, offers, and analytics scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. POS integration partners (Toast, Olo, Brink). Webhooks for real-time loyalty events.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — restaurant loyalty enterprise pricing
pricing.notes: San Jose, California. Founded 2010. Leading QSR loyalty platform. Clients include Pizza Hut, Checkers, Denny's, and Jamba Juice. Acquired by PAX Technology 2021 for $500M. 200M+ consumer profiles. Competes with Paytronix and Thanx for restaurant loyalty. Strong POS integrations (Toast, Olo).

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: 200M+ consumer profiles with dining behavior — CCPA compliance critical for California guests
No public MCP server — API key and OAuth2 REST API with developer portal
PAX Technology acquisition — platform may evolve; verify current API surface
POS integration is source of truth — Punchh loyalty data depends on POS transaction feed
TCPA compliance required for automated push and SMS loyalty campaigns
Offer automation must handle expiration logic correctly — stale offers cause guest frustration
agent_readiness.security_notes: Guest loyalty and dining behavior data. PCI-DSS, SOC2, CCPA. OAuth2. US data residency. 200M consumer profile scale.

security_score_components.security_notes: Guest dining data at scale. PCI-DSS, SOC2, CCPA. OAuth2. US data residency. QSR loyalty platform.
